历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 8686 → 11535 → 10184 → 9046 → 11138. In recent years, there has been significant fluctuation, with a large drop in 2022 followed by a recovery in 2023–2024, and another drop to 11138 in 2025. Over the past 3 years, the cumulative drop is about 2000 positions, with a baseline of approximately 11138 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 42 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 41 in 2024, and 46 in 2025. In 2026 (§7), the plan is 48, an increase of about 4.3% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and tends to push rankings backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 40th, with recent rankings stable in the 38–40 range, belonging to the mid-tier 985 level. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is relatively positive, mainly due to incidents such as a master's graduate thanking the security department in their acknowledgments for allowing a scrap collector to enter the campus, which enhanced the school's image. Its Douyin popularity ranks 53rd (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure, and increasing attention for applications. No significant gaps in admission records have been observed. It has 5 A- or above disciplines: Ecology A+, Grass Science A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, and Biology A-. Grass Science and Ecology are top in the country, directly related to enrollment majors such as Grass Science, Geography Science, and Biological Science, attracting applicants to related programs.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: STEM majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain stable popularity. These align well with the Physics Category enrollment majors, attracting high-scoring applicants. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Jilin Province is approximately 110,868, slightly lower than in 2025, with an estimated 79,825 in the Physics Category. The slight decrease in candidate numbers slightly eases competition, roughly flat compared to 2024. Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou City, Gansu Province, far from Jilin Province, making it a cross-province application. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province has shown a slight expansion trend in recent years, with 48 planned for 2026, accounting for a small proportion of the university's total national plan, so regional preference has a neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 11138, the 4.3% enrollment expansion in 2026 intensifying competition, the positive school reputation and relatively hot Douyin popularity attracting attention, the sustained high popularity of STEM majors boosting application willingness, and the slight decrease in candidate numbers slightly easing competition, a small negative correction is made based on the slight decrease in candidate numbers and positive reputation. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 11399, with a range of 10899–11899.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 10800), you can focus on popular majors like Clinical Medicine and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., outside 11800), you should prioritize Tier 3 advantageous majors (Grass Science A+, Geography A-) to ensure admission.
